details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory per governance contract.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ and .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs) and reports/audit/ are present.

Active moltbot/ code directory found with 5 Python modules (sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py references Moltbot. Excluded: reports/audit, reports/daily, docs, board/eod/out (historical logs/documentation of removal).
